name: v2.7.1 — MySQL 2.0 + 30-day FREE demo
body:
## BILOHASH Hosting CMS v2.7.1

**MySQL 2.0 + 30 days FREE for testing** · Live: https://bilohash.com/hosting/

| Role | Login | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Client panel | demo | demo |
| Platform admin | admin | admin |

### 30-day FREE demo (MySQL included)
- Full **MySQL 2.0** schema — users, sites, settings, invoices, orders, activity logs
- **JSON → MySQL** migration via `/migrate-to-mysql.php`
- 40+ hPanel-style tools, 15 ecosystem planets installer
- i18n: **Ukrainian · English · Norwegian**
- After 30 days: **info@bilohash.com**

### 🇺🇦 30 днів безкоштовно
MySQL 2.0 для тесту на своєму сервері — повна схема, міграція JSON, всі функції панелі. Далі: info@bilohash.com

### 🇳🇴 30 dager gratis
MySQL 2.0 inkludert for testing på egen server. Deretter: info@bilohash.com

### Screenshots

![Dashboard](https://bilohash.com/hosting/docs/screenshots/dashboard.webp)

![Security + malware scanner](https://bilohash.com/hosting/docs/screenshots/security.webp)

![Domains](https://bilohash.com/hosting/docs/screenshots/domains.webp)

![File manager](https://bilohash.com/hosting/docs/screenshots/file_manager.webp)

![Platform clients](https://bilohash.com/hosting/docs/screenshots/clients.webp)

**60 WebP screenshots** in `docs/screenshots/` · Details: [docs/GITHUB-RELEASE-v2.7.1.md](https://github.com/Ruslan-Bilohash/hosting/blob/main/docs/GITHUB-RELEASE-v2.7.1.md)

### Quick start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/Ruslan-Bilohash/hosting.git
cd hosting
php -S localhost:8080
# /install.php — accept 30-day demo license
```

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/Ruslan-Bilohash/hosting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) · [LICENSE.md](https://github.com/Ruslan-Bilohash/hosting/blob/main/LICENSE.md)
